title: Falconera viscosa
taxonomy: Falconera viscosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This family comprises around 2,700 species of flowering plants, commonly known as spurge or euphorbia. Falconera viscosa is native to South America and belongs to the genus Falconera. The genus Falconera is a small group of plants, and Falconera viscosa is its only described species. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Falconera viscosa.
